coreResponsibility: A UI plugin for the Kaltura Player JS that provides 'Skip Intro' and 'Watch Next' (outro) functionality, allowing users to skip designated intro/outro segments during video playback.

featureOwnership: Skip Intro button display and interaction
Watch Next (outro) button display and interaction
Time-based skip point detection during playback
Configurable timeout for skip button visibility
Support for absolute (startTime/endTime) and relative time configurations
Internationalization (i18n) support for skip button labels
Responsive behavior (hidden on tiny player sizes)
dataHandling: SkipPoint objects containing startTime and endTime for intro/outro segments
SkipConfig for plugin configuration (timeout, intro/outro relativeTime)
Player metadata parsing for intro/outro timing data
Current mode state management (INTRO, OUTRO, OFF)
Player currentTime monitoring via TIME_UPDATE events

upstream: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js - Core player framework and BasePlugin class
Kaltura Media Content (KMC) - Provides intro/outro metadata via player.sources.metadata
Player UI framework (Preact-based) - For component rendering and Redux state
downstream: Kaltura Player UI layer - Consumes skip button component in InteractiveArea or BottomBar
Analytics/tracking systems - Can subscribe to SKIP_BUTTON_CLICK and SKIP_BUTTON_DISPLAYED events

entryPoints: src/skip.js - Main Skip plugin class (extends BasePlugin)

dispatched: skip_button_click - Fired when user clicks the skip button
skip_button_displayed - Fired when skip button becomes visible
consumed: FIRST_PLAYING - Initializes intro data and listeners
TIME_UPDATE - Monitors playback position for skip point ranges
DURATION_CHANGE - Sets outro data based on video duration

configurationOptions.timeout: Duration in seconds the skip button remains visible (default: 5)
configurationOptions.intro.relativeTime: Relative time from start for intro end (alternative to metadata)
configurationOptions.outro.relativeTime: Relative time from end for outro start (alternative to metadata)
